channel.title: The Wandering Lantern — Upcoming Events
channel.description: Upcoming events at The Wandering Lantern, a children's bookstore in Lakewood, OH.

item.title: Once Upon a Dime
item.description:
April 2, 2026 · During Store Hours · Ages: All ages

Celebrate Children's Book Day with us! Select books priced at just 10 cents — only on Thursday, April 2nd.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Cardboard Maker's Space
item.description:
April 3, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM · Ages: All ages

A night of creativity and invention! Design a robot, build an architectural structure, or create a piece of art — all out of cardboard. $12 per person for supplies.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Visit with the White Rabbit
item.description:
April 4, 2026 · 11:00 AM - 2:00 PM · Ages: All ages

The White Rabbit is hopping into The Wandering Lantern the day before Easter. Storytime at 11, then stick around for photos with the guest of honor from 12 to 2.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Meet Charlotte the Perching Detective!
item.description:
April 11, 2026 · 11:00 AM · Ages: All ages

Charlotte the golden Cocker Spaniel is a trained detective — and she's coming to prove it. Kids hide the scent tins, she finds them every time. Author Kristine Sheppard will be here to read the book that started it all.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga — Earth Day Edition
item.description:
April 16, 2026 · 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 1-10

Stretch, breathe, and celebrate the Earth. Jena from Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga leads two sessions — little ones at 5 PM, bigger kids at 6 — with an Earth Day twist.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Layered Paper Art Workshop with Marina Papercuts
item.description:
April 17, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 8:00 PM · Ages: 12+

Artist Marina Papercuts guides you through creating a layered paper art piece — cutting, stacking, and building depth one sheet at a time. A hands-on evening workshop for ages 12+. $15 per person.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Storytime with Kellie DuBay Gillis
item.description:
April 18, 2026 · 11:00 AM · Ages: All ages

A Fairview Park scientist who writes picture books. Two nature stories. Two days before Earth Day. Kellie DuBay Gillis is your neighbor — and she's coming to story time.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Family Classics Book Club
item.description:
April 21, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 6-12

Join us this month for 'Winnie the Pooh' by A.A. Milne.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Literary Cleveland Poetry Crawl
item.description:
April 25, 2026 · 3:30 PM - 4:00 PM · Ages: All ages

Four teen poets take over the bookstore for 30 minutes as part of Literary Cleveland's city-wide poetry crawl. Come listen, snap, and support young voices.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Silhouettes by Chris Casey
item.description:
April 29, 2026 · 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM · Ages: All ages

A real silhouette artist, right here in the bookstore. Chris Casey cuts your child's profile in minutes — a keepsake that lasts forever. Book your slot ahead of time.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Parent & Child Painting Class with Ohio City Art House
item.description:
May 2, 2026 · 12:50 PM - 2:00 PM · Ages: 3+

Grab a brush and paint alongside your little one. Ohio City Art House brings a guided painting class to The Wandering Lantern — no experience needed, just show up and create something together.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Family Classics Book Club
item.description:
May 19, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 6-12

Join us this month for 'The Secret Garden' by Frances Hodgson Burnett.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Camp Sunshine Kids Yoga
item.description:
May 21, 2026 · 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 1-10

Two yoga sessions, one cozy bookstore. Jena from Camp Sunshine leads Parent & Tot at 5 PM and Kids Yoga at 6 — movement, music, games, and stories.

Learn more & register →

item.title: Family Classics Book Club
item.description:
June 16, 2026 · 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM · Ages: 6-12

Join us this month for 'The Wind in the Willows' by Kenneth Grahame.

Learn more & register →
